name: ISO 50001 Energy Baseline Calculator
description: Calculates the energy baseline and performance indicators per ISO 50001:2018, including normalization for production volume, weather, and other relevant variables.

inputs.label: Total Energy Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Total energy consumed by the organization in the baseline period (e.g., one year).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total energy consumed by the organization in the baseline period (e.g., one year).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kuruluşun baz dönemde (örneğin bir yıl) tükettiği toplam enerji.

inputs.label: Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total production output in the baseline period (e.g., number of products, tons, or other relevant unit).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total production output in the baseline period (e.g., number of products, tons, or other relevant unit).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Baz dönemdeki toplam üretim çıktısı (örneğin ürün sayısı, ton veya diğer ilgili birim).

inputs.label: Heating Degree Days (HDD)
inputs.businessContext: Annual heating degree days for the facility location, used to normalize weather-related energy use.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual heating degree days for the facility location, used to normalize weather-related energy use.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesis konumu için yıllık ısıtma derece günleri, hava durumuna bağlı enerji kullanımını normalleştirmek için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Cooling Degree Days (CDD)
inputs.businessContext: Annual cooling degree days for the facility location, used to normalize weather-related energy use.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual cooling degree days for the facility location, used to normalize weather-related energy use.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesis konumu için yıllık soğutma derece günleri, hava durumuna bağlı enerji kullanımını normalleştirmek için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Operating Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total hours the facility operated during the baseline period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total hours the facility operated during the baseline period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Baz dönemde tesisin çalıştığı toplam saat.

inputs.label: Energy Source Mix
inputs.businessContext: Primary energy sources used, affecting emission factors and normalization.

businessContext_i18n.en: Primary energy sources used, affecting emission factors and normalization.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kullanılan birincil enerji kaynakları, emisyon faktörlerini ve normalleştirmeyi etkiler.

inputs.label: Baseline Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of baseline per ISO 50001:2018 clause 6.3.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of baseline per ISO 50001:2018 clause 6.3.

inputs.label: Apply Weather Normalization
inputs.businessContext: If true, adjusts energy consumption for heating and cooling degree days.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, adjusts energy consumption for heating and cooling degree days.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, enerji tüketimini ısıtma ve soğutma derece günlerine göre ayarlar.

rules.message: Production volume must be greater than zero when production normalization is enabled.
At least one of Heating Degree Days or Cooling Degree Days must be greater than zero when weather normalization is enabled.
Operating hours must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Energy intensity is more than 50% above baseline. Investigate potential energy waste.
Energy intensity has doubled compared to baseline. Immediate action required.
Production volume has dropped more than 20% from baseline. Re-evaluate baseline relevance.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
